title: ToolTreaux 1lb Steel Sledge Hammer with Non Slip Rubber Grip, 10 Inch
description:
ToolTreaux's sledge hammer combines strength, precision striking and durability, all into a compact ten inches of forged steel. Constructed from high quality materials, this hammer is designed to withstand rigorous use, ensuring long lasting performance, making it a dependable addition to any tool bag or tool belt. The double sided sledge hammer features one inch smooth striking heads on both sides, and a three inch overall head length.

ToolTreaux 1lb Steel Sledge Hammer with Non Slip Rubber Grip, 10 Inch

ToolTreaux's sledge hammer combines strength, precision striking and durability, all into a compact ten inches of forged steel. Constructed from high quality materials, this hammer is designed to withstand rigorous use, ensuring long lasting performance, making it a dependable addition to any tool bag or tool belt. The double sided sledge hammer features one inch smooth striking heads on both sides, and a three inch overall head length.

Key Features

  • 10 INCH SLEDGE HAMMER: Double sided hammer features one inch smooth striking heads and a three inch overall head length; the sledge hammers compact size allows for precise strikes while delivering the necessary force to get tasks done efficiently
  • ERGONOMIC RUBBER HANDLE: Featuring an ergonomically designed rubber handle, this sledge hammer offers an excellent non slip grip and comfort that allows for control and precision with every swing; minimal vibration and maximum impact
  • DURABLE STEEL CONSTRUCTION: Constructed from high quality forged steel, this hammer is designed to withstand rigorous use, ensuring long lasting performance, making it a dependable addition to any tool bag or tool belt
  • MULTIDISCIPLINARY HAMMER: Ideal for both professionals, DIY or hobbyists, this two tone 10 inch sledge hammer is ideal for a wide range of applications; geology, rock hounding, masonry, fossils, archeology, paleontology, woodworking, striking cold chisels, brick chisels, punches, spikes and more
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 10 x 3 x 1.5 inches; Weight: 1.36lbs

Product Specifications

  • MPN: KL9Z23GE
  • UPC: 810131700461
  • Color: Black

Equipped with a non slip, ergonomically designed handle, this sledge hammer provides a comfortable grip and reduces the risk of slippage. The handle’s durability ensures it will withstand repeated impacts without compromising on integrity.

Ideal for both trade professionals, serious DIYers or craft hobbyists, this two tone 10 inch sledge hammer is useable across a wide range of applications: geology, rock hounding, masonry, fossils, archeology, paleontology, woodworking, leatherworking, striking cold chisels, brick chisels, punches, spikes and more. Despite its compact size, this sledge hammer has been made to be used; its balanced weight distribution minimizes user fatigue, making it ideal for extended use across many different projects.
